rationale: The app cohort is directionally viable, but direct behavioral evidence for the proposed Brazilian segment is still missing.
assumptions: A signup-to-first-plan flow is a useful proxy for initial value.
open_questions: Will qualified visitors complete a first weekly plan?

next_experiment.primary_metric: activated first plans / unique qualified landing visitors
next_experiment.pass_threshold: At least 8% after the precommitted sample/time condition.
next_experiment.fail_threshold: Below 3% with valid tracking and the precommitted sample/time condition.
next_experiment.stop_rule: Stop at the cost cap or when the precommitted sample/time condition is met.
